markdown:
#  Respond to an Action Required Email for a Submittal Package as an Approver 
##  Background 
When sending a submittal package out for review, Procore sends an 'Action Required' email to the people designated as an 'Approver' on the submittal in the package. The designated Approver must then review the package and its submittals. Then submit a separate response to each submittal in the package.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Standard' or 'Admin' on the project's Submittals tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Open the "Action Required" message in your email program.
  2. Choose from these options:
     * Review Package in Procore
     * Submittal Package Coversheet
     * View in Procore 


##  Next Step 
  * [Respond to a Submittal as a Reviewer](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/respond-to-a-submittal-as-an-approver)


## See Also
  * [Best Practices: Submittal Packages - Creation and Review](https://v2.support.procore.com/reference-best-practices-submittal-packages-creation-and-review)
  * [Submittals - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/permissions)
  * [Who receives an email when a submittal is created or updated?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-who-receives-an-email-when-a-submittal-is-created-or-updated)


**Review Package in Procore**. Click this link to launch Procore's Submittals tool in your web browser and open the submittal package in view mode.   
  
Note: If you are NOT logged into Procore, you will be prompted to enter your credentials before you can view the package.
**Submittal Package Coversheet**. Click this link to open a PDF version of the submittal package. You can also open a PDF version of each submittal in the package by clicking **Download PDF** in the Submittals table of the package PDF.
**View in Procore**. Click this link to open the Submittal in Procore.
title: Respond to an Action Required Email for a Submittal Package as an Approver
description: How to respond an 'Action Required' email message about a submittal package when you've been designated as an approver on a the submittals in the package.
